coverage_limitation: Sampled scan only (~3.1% of the partition was tested). A clean result does not rule out bad sectors in the remaining ~97% of the disk.

interpretation.customer_summary: Some disk areas are reading unusually slowly. The drive may be showing early wear.
interpretation.technician_summary: Profile=fast coverage=3.1% blocks_attempted=61035 blocks_failed=0 blocks_slow=37 verdict=SAMPLE_SLOW_READS conclusion_strength=sampled
interpretation.what_this_means: Slow reads detected in 2 ranges. Sampled scan — untested areas may also have slow sectors.
interpretation.recommended_action: Back up data promptly. Consider cloning to a new drive.

recommendations: Back up data promptly. Consider cloning to a new drive.
